title: diptera sinensis
side_effects: Diptera sinensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can cause gastrointestinal problems, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use of Diptera sinensis without proper medical guidance can also lead to liver damage and increased risk of bleeding. Furthermore, improper preparation and dosing of Diptera sinensis can interact with other medications and exacerbate underlying health conditions.
